mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USERS WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USERS WHERE phone = #{phone}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_USERS.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO USERS ( email, password_hash, name, phone, birth_date, marketing_agree, privacy_agree, status_code, is_email_verified, is_phone_verified, push_enabled, login_fail_count, created_at, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{birthDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{marketingAgree, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y', 'ACTIVE', 'N', 'N', 'Y', 0, SYSTIMESTAMP, 'N' )
mapper.update:
UPDATE USERS
name = #{name},
phone = #{phone}, is_phone_verified = 'N',
job = #{job}, income_level_code = #{incomeLevelCode}, push_enabled = #{pushEnabled}, marketing_agree = #{marketingAgree}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP
WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
UPDATE USERS SET is_email_verified = #{isEmailVerified}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE USERS SET is_phone_verified = #{isPhoneVerified}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE USERS SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, last_password_changed_at = #{lastPasswordChangedAt}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE USERS SET login_fail_count = 0, locked_until = NULL WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE USER_SESSIONS SET revoked_yn = 'Y', revoked_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked_yn = 'N'
